name: Louis C.K.

acts.description: Admitted to exposing himself and masturbating in front of at least five women without consent
Used industry power to suppress allegations for years before admission

behavior_summary: Admitted to sexual misconduct with multiple women in his industry. Returned to touring after a brief hiatus and faced no lasting professional consequences.

art.summary: One of the most praised stand-up comedians of his generation. His FX show Louie was widely considered the best comedy of its era.

accountability_events: 2017 issued public statement admitting to the allegations

verdict.blurb: He admitted it, took about fourteen months off, then came back to sold-out crowds joking about being cancelled. The women whose careers he derailed are still dealing with it. He seems fine.
